key_findings: Two-stage filter architecture (pre-filter gate → scored evaluation) keeps ≤20% noise target achievable without manual curation; pre-filter should eliminate ≥50% of raw ideas before scoring begins

Five-dimension scoring model (D1 strategic fit, D2 impact potential, D3 integration risk, D4 ops discipline, D5 evidence quality) each 0–3; composite = (sum/15) × 100 — produces consistent comparable scores across cycles
Three integration windows (W0 Now, W1 Near 1-3mo, W2 Medium 3-6mo) plus Backlog and Sunset; W0 requires reversibility=HIGH + composite ≥75 to protect against churn in deterministic ops
Impact hypothesis template (IF/THEN/BECAUSE/cost/reversibility) required for all ideas ≥50 before W1/W0 gate — forces specificity and auditability on all promoted candidates
Sunset protocol: 3 consecutive cycles with composite <25 → permanent closure; archived not deleted; operator override creates new entry with parent_id reference
Persistent idea ledger (idea_ledger.json) tracks full cycle history per idea — prevents re-harvesting duplicates and enables trend analysis on scoring drift
Source registry (source_registry.json) tracks last_harvested date; staleness alert if >35 days — ensures no source silently missed for more than one cycle
Framework calibration metrics (noise rate, pre-filter hit rate, shortlist size, sunset rate) with defined alert thresholds detect scoring drift before it compounds
14-day monthly cadence: harvest (D1–3), score (D4–6), noise pass (D7), hypothesis (D8–10), staging (D11–12), report (D13–14) — structured to produce output within single sprint equivalent
New sources enter registry as active:false and require 1 trial harvest before activation — prevents token waste on untested source quality

decisions.title: Two-stage filter (pre-filter + scored evaluation) over single-pass scoring
decisions.summary: Pre-filter gate eliminates structurally disqualifying ideas before scoring begins; scored evaluation handles ambiguous cases with dimensional breakdown
decisions.rationale: Single-pass scoring wastes evaluator bandwidth on ideas that are obviously disqualified (already implemented, contradicts constraints, no ROI pathway). Pre-filter handles deterministic rejections in O(1) per idea; scoring handles probabilistic evaluation. Separation reduces noise rate without tightening scoring thresholds globally.

decisions.title: Five-dimension scoring model with composite threshold classification
decisions.summary: D1-D5 each scored 0–3; composite (sum/15)×100; thresholds at 75 (high-confidence), 50 (deferred), 25 (low-priority), below (noise)
decisions.rationale: A single summary score hides which dimension is failing. Dimension breakdown identifies why an idea is scoring low (e.g., high impact but low evidence quality vs low strategic fit) and guides what evidence would be needed to promote it. Consistent anchors across cycles prevent scoring drift.

decisions.title: Impact hypothesis required for all ideas ≥50 before staging
decisions.summary: IF/THEN/BECAUSE template with cost estimate and reversibility rating; no idea enters W0/W1 without completed hypothesis
decisions.rationale: Unstructured justifications produce adoption decisions that cannot be audited or revoked. The hypothesis forces three disciplines: specificity (what changes), evidence (why expected), reversibility (how to undo). Reversibility is the critical constraint for systems with churn intolerance.

decisions.title: Sunset protocol: 3-cycle threshold with archived state
decisions.summary: Ideas with 3 consecutive composite scores <25 are permanently closed; sunset entries archived in ledger with status=sunset; operator override creates new entry (parent_id reference)
decisions.rationale: Two failure modes avoided: deleting ideas loses institutional memory (did we consider this before?); never sunsetting ideas creates unbounded backlog that dilutes shortlist quality. Three-cycle rule provides statistical confidence that the idea's fit is structural, not timing-based.

decisions.title: Persistent ledger with full cycle history over session-only tracking
decisions.summary: idea_ledger.json append-only; each cycle adds to cycle_history array per idea; no historical records modified after cycle close
decisions.rationale: Without cross-cycle tracking, the same idea gets re-harvested and re-scored repeatedly, wasting evaluation bandwidth. The ledger enables: duplicate suppression, trend analysis (is an idea improving over time?), and full audit trail for any adoption or sunset decision.

decisions.title: New sources enter registry as active:false until trial harvest completes
decisions.summary: Source activation requires 1 completed trial harvest; prevents untested sources from appearing in shortlist without quality validation
decisions.rationale: Source quality varies significantly. An untested source might produce 50 raw ideas with 90% pre-filter rejection rate — all evaluation bandwidth wasted. Trial harvest validates source relevance before full inclusion.

dimensions.name: strategic_fit
dimensions.description: Alignment with current Pandavs runtime operations and workflows

dimensions.name: impact_potential
dimensions.description: Expected ROI: throughput delta, cost reduction, or coverage expansion

dimensions.name: integration_risk
dimensions.description: Risk of implementation: dependency complexity, churn, side effects (0=high risk, 3=near-zero risk)

dimensions.name: ops_discipline_alignment
dimensions.description: Compliance with budget discipline, determinism, and integrity constraints

thresholds.action: shortlist immediately; impact hypothesis required; assign to W0 or W1
impact hypothesis required; assign to W1 or W2; 3-month re-evaluation
reject; log in noise registry; increment sunset_count if repeat

pre_filter_criteria.criterion: Directly contradicts deterministic or integrity constraints
Requires external dependency with no documented fallback
Active sunset status (3 consecutive cycles score <25)

integration_windows.label: Now
integration_windows.criteria: composite ≥75, reversibility=HIGH, ops ready, impact hypothesis complete

integration_windows.label: Near-term
integration_windows.criteria: composite ≥65, design path clear, effort <1 sprint

integration_windows.label: Medium-term
integration_windows.criteria: composite ≥50, requires design work before implementation

integration_windows.label: Long-term
integration_windows.criteria: composite ≥50, premature given current ops priorities

integration_windows.label: Backlog
integration_windows.criteria: composite ≥50, blocked by external dep or competing priority

schedule.description: Scan all active sources; capture raw ideas with source attribution; assign IDEA-YYYYMM-NNN IDs
Apply 5-dimension scoring to all pre-filter survivors
Reject ideas scoring <25; document rejection reason in noise registry
Draft impact hypotheses for all candidates scoring ≥50
Assign each surviving candidate to integration window (W0-W3/BL)
Generate monthly report; commit to Notion Decision Register + Obsidian

persistent_artifacts.purpose: Tracks all input sources, harvest dates, activation status
Persistent cross-cycle idea tracking with scoring history
Monthly report for Notion Decision Register + Obsidian consumption

calibration_metrics.action: expand source coverage; check D5 scoring calibration
harvest targeting wrong source areas; refocus review scope
add new active source to registry
review D2/D3 weights; system may be over-penalizing integration risk
execution gap; prioritize hypothesis drafting before staging decisions
alert; schedule emergency harvest for stale source

sunset_protocol.action: status → sunset; archived in ledger; never re-evaluated unless operator override
sunset_protocol.operator_override: creates new ledger entry with parent_id reference; original sunset record unmodified

risk_model.title: Idea churn exceeds ops stability threshold
risk_model.mitigation: W0 gate requires reversibility=HIGH + score ≥75; design review required before W0 promotion

risk_model.title: Pre-filter over-tuned; good ideas rejected early
risk_model.mitigation: Track pre-filter hit rate; quarterly calibration review of PF criteria

risk_model.title: Impact hypotheses written but never acted on
risk_model.mitigation: W0 items auto-prompt implementation ticket creation in Notion Decision Register

risk_model.title: Scoring inconsistency across cycles (drift)
risk_model.mitigation: Publish D1-D5 anchor examples; re-score sample idea each cycle for calibration check

risk_model.title: Token waste on low-quality new sources
risk_model.mitigation: New sources enter as active:false; 1 trial harvest required before activation

risk_model.title: Ledger grows unbounded over years
risk_model.mitigation: Sunset entries archived annually; default ledger queries filter to status=active

recommended_actions.action: Create artifacts/idea-registry/source_registry.json with EKLAVYA (SRC-001) and ATLAS (SRC-002) as initial active sources
Create artifacts/idea-registry/idea_ledger.json with empty ideas:[] array — establishes persistent state before first harvest
Run first harvest immediately (days 1-3 of cadence) — establishes baseline shortlist and calibrates pre-filter against actual source content
Enforce impact hypothesis for every idea ≥50 before W1/W0 gate — prevents unspecified ideas from entering ops backlog
Set Notion Decision Register template to accept staging map directly from monthly report — prevents copy-paste errors
Review pre-filter hit rate after first 3 cycles — calibrate PF-04 (ROI pathway) based on actual rejection pattern
Add source_staleness_days alert for any source exceeding 35 days without harvest — prevents silent source drift
Quarterly framework review: inspect sunset rate, noise rate trend, D5 score distribution — identifies systematic scoring bias

assumptions: A1: EKLAVYA and ATLAS produce at minimum 5–15 new or updated ideas per monthly cycle
A2: Pre-filter eliminates ≥50% of raw harvested ideas using structural criteria before scoring
A3: D1–D5 dimension anchors are calibrated to Pandavs runtime strategic fit definition
A4: Notion Decision Register and Obsidian are writable at month-end for report delivery
A5: Adopted W0 ideas tracked via separate WO or ticket system; outside this framework scope
A6: Source content accessible within harvest window (days 1–3); access issues flagged as framework alerts
A7: Ledger schema is append-only; no historical scoring data modified after cycle closes
